# User Stories - GiftLink Project

1. As a user, I want to register a new account. [Label: new]
2. As a user, I want to login with my email. [Label: backlog]
3. As a user, I want to view all gifts on the main page. [Label: new]
4. As a user, I want to search for gifts by name. [Label: backlog]
5. As a user, I want to filter gifts by category. [Label: icebox]
6. As a user, I want to see gift details when I click on it. [Label: new]
7. As an admin, I want to fix the login session bug. [Label: technical debt]
8. As a user, I want to logout safely from the app. [Label: backlog]
